arts.ttl: Tottenham and Man United target with 10 G/A this season insists on staying at current club until 2027
arts.sum: Barcelona winger Raphinha has stated that he has no plans to leave the Catalan club before his contract expires in 2027 despite being linked with a move away over the summer. arts.ttl: Ferencvaros vs Tottenham predictions: Spurs to force Botka into the book
arts.sum: A reshuffled Tottenham should still have enough to win their Europa League tie at Ferencvaros, but Steve Davies believes focusing on cards rather than goals could pay dividends.

arts.ttl: Tottenham make bizarre Ferencvaros travelling squad decision that makes no sense
arts.sum: It's matchday minus one for Tottenham in Europe and given it's an away trip that means we get to see the players in the squad boarding a plane. Tottenham got their Europa League campaign off to the best possible start last week with a 3-0 win over Qarabag.

arts.ttl: Genoa Kicking the Tires on Former Tottenham Staple
arts.sum: Genoa continue to weigh signing a free agent after a series of injuries in the midfield, and the latest name to fall on their radar is Dele Alli, who’s out of contract after spending time with Besiktas. They are pondering also Antonio Candreva. The post Genoa Kicking the Tires on Former Tottenham Staple appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
